mapper.select: SELECT user_id, str_stat, str_min, men_stat, men_min, int_stat, int_min, created_at, updated_at FROM user_stats WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_stats SET str_stat=#{strStat}, str_min=#{strMin}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_stats SET men_stat=#{menStat}, men_min=#{menMin}, updated_at= NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_stats SET int_stat = #{intStat}, int_min = #{intMin}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
